  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    sys/kern             vfs_mount.c 
  Log:
  In vfs_scanopt(), make sure that the mount option value is not NULL
  before calling vsscanf().

  Submitted by:   Jaakko Heinonen <jh saunalahti fi>
  MFC after:      3 days
